commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: The morning sun casts long shadows across the school courtyard as a new day begins.

commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: This is {player_name}'s first day at the prestigious Sakura Academy.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: I've been waiting for this moment for so long. Today, everything changes.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: I hope {target_name} is also attending this academy. It's been too long since we last met.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: The hallway is so crowded... Where could {target_name} be?

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: {target_name}! I can't believe it's really you!

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: It's been what... three years? You've changed so much!

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: You too! I'm so glad we both made it into Sakura Academy.

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: I have some free time before classes start. Want to do something together?

options.label: option2
options.text: Take a walk around the school

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: I remember how much you loved the Egg Catcher game! Want to play?

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: Oh yes! I haven't played that in ages. Let's see who can get the higher score!

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: Wow, that was so much fun! You've gotten really good at it!

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: I had a great teacher back then, remember? But you gave me quite a challenge!

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: This day turned out better than I could have imagined.

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: We should head to class before we're late.

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: You're right. Let's meet again during lunch break!

commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: As {player_name} watched {target_name} walk away, a sense of anticipation filled the air.

commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: This was only the beginning of their story at Sakura Academy...
